raw_commentary_text: Management described a more promotional environment, softer traffic, and clear price sensitivity in several markets. The team also acknowledged more competitive activity and elevated labor pressure.
Management emphasized resilient demand, a sticky installed base, and disciplined pricing. China commentary was measured, but product loyalty and services momentum remained clear themes.
Management highlighted sustained AI demand, healthy pricing, strong renewal behavior, and continued product innovation. Commentary suggested share gains across several enterprise workloads.

Management described solid engagement, better monetization, and healthier pricing discipline than a year ago. Competitive commentary was calmer and product improvements were framed as helping retention.

Management emphasized traffic resilience, membership strength, and careful value positioning without heavy promotions. Commentary suggested the company remains disciplined rather than aggressive on price.
